skills.title: My Skills
skills.guide: These skills were installed by other tools. Use “Disable” to turn one off for now, or “Delete” to remove it completely. Both actions make an automatic backup first, and you can restore from “Undo” anytime.

actions.disableHint: Disabling just turns it off — files stay on disk and you can re-enable anytime. Nothing is deleted.
actions.deleteHint: Removes the skill from disk (a backup is taken first, so it is restorable).

import.found: Found {{count}} skills not yet under management

install.title: Install
install.help: Add a new skill to a selected tool. A safety check runs before anything is written.
install.force: Continue even if safety blocks it
install.blockedWhy: These skills failed the safety check and were blocked. If you trust the source after reviewing the reasons, you can force the install with a justification (it will be recorded).
install.forceReasonPlaceholder: e.g. from my own private repo, manually reviewed
install.forceAnyway: I understand the risk — install anyway

sync.title: Sync
sync.help: Reapply the saved list of skills. Useful when something is missing or out of date.

restore.title: Undo (Backups)
restore.help: Open automatic backups and recover a skill after a mistaken delete or disable.

confirm.install: Install this skill? It will run a safety check before writing.
confirm.forceInstall: This skips safety blocking and continues. Are you sure?
confirm.toggleOn: Enable {{name}}? A backup will be made first.
confirm.toggleOff: Disable {{name}}? A backup will be made first.
confirm.remove: Delete {{name}}? A backup will be made first.

consequence.backup: ✅ A backup is taken before any change — you can restore from a backup anytime if something goes wrong.
consequence.disableKept: ℹ️ This only disables the skill. Its files stay on disk and you can re-enable it anytime — nothing is deleted.
consequence.restoreOverwrite: ✅ This overwrites current skills with the chosen backup; the current state is backed up first, so it stays reversible.
consequence.forceRisk: ⚠️ You are skipping the safety check. Only continue if you trust the source — at your own risk.

import.confirm: Bring these {{count}} existing skills under management?

bypass.title: Skills that skipped the safety check
bypass.subtitle: These skills were installed past the safety block. Make sure you trust their source.

history.guide: Your undo button: every change is auto-backed-up here, so you can roll back to any point in time.
history.empty: No backups yet. After you make changes, restorable points appear here.

dashboard.partialLoad: Some sections failed to load; the rest are shown normally. Affected:
dashboard.fixtureMode: Demo mode: sample data; write actions are simulated and won’t touch your real config.

errorBoundary.message: skill-switch hit an error (please send the details below to the developer):

about.privacy: 🔒 Zero telemetry · everything runs on your machine · nothing is uploaded, works offline
